seo.title: QR Code Generator
seo.description: Generate, style, and download high-quality QR codes without touching a backend.
seo.ogDescription: Generate, style, and download high-quality QR codes without touching a backend.
seo.twitterDescription: Generate, style, and download high-quality QR codes without touching a backend.

layout.headerSubtitle: No sign-up needed. Runs entirely in your browser.

hero.title: Sculpt standout QR codes
hero.subtitle: Paste your link, make it yours, download in seconds.

config.helper: Enter the content you want to encode in the QR code.

controls.correctionHint: Higher = survives damage and supports logos.
controls.correctionBelowRecommended: Lower reliability can make this code harder to scan. Highest is recommended.
controls.correctionTooltip: How much of the QR code can be covered or damaged and still scan. Low gives a compact code; Highest lets you overlay a logo at the cost of a denser pattern.
controls.logoErrorUrl: Could not load image from URL
controls.logoTransparencyHint: PNG or SVG works best for transparent logos
controls.wifiHiddenTooltip: Check this only if your network is hidden and doesn't appear in Wi-Fi scan results.
controls.wifiWepWarning: WEP is outdated and easily cracked. Use WPA/WPA2 if possible.
controls.wifiCorrectionHint: Printed codes scan best at Highest reliability.
controls.vcardNameHint: At least one name is required.
controls.vcardCorrectionHint: Contact QR codes are data-dense — Highest reliability is recommended.
controls.emailCorrectionHint: Highest reliability recommended for email codes.
controls.emailModeHint: Scan to open a pre-addressed email draft.
controls.emailPayloadWarning: Long message body makes the QR harder to scan reliably. Keep it concise.
controls.smsNumberError: Enter a phone number using digits, e.g. +95 9 123 456 789
controls.smsModeHint: Scan to open a text message with the number and message ready to send.
controls.smsCorrectionHint: Set to Highest for the most reliable SMS scanning.
controls.smsPayloadWarning: Long message makes the QR harder to scan reliably. Keep it concise.
controls.telNumberError: Enter a phone number using digits, e.g. +95 9 123 456 789
controls.telCorrectionHint: Set to Highest for the most reliable scanning.
controls.phoneNoCountryCodeCaution: No country code yet. Add one (like +95) so it works reliably everywhere.
controls.geoModeHint: Scan to open this spot in a map app.
controls.geoCoordinateHelp: Don't know them? In Google Maps, right-click your spot and copy the coordinates.
controls.geoLocationError: Couldn't get your location. Enter coordinates manually, or check your browser's location permission.
controls.geoLocationUnsupported: Your browser doesn't support location. Enter coordinates manually.
controls.geoLatitudeError: Latitude must be a number between -90 and 90.
controls.geoLongitudeError: Longitude must be a number between -180 and 180.
controls.geoCorrectionHint: Set to Highest for the most reliable scanning.
controls.veventModeHint: Scan to add this event to the calendar.
controls.veventEndError: The end can't be before the start.
controls.veventPayloadWarning: A long description makes the QR harder to scan reliably. Keep it concise.
controls.veventCorrectionHint: Set to Highest for the most reliable scanning.
controls.frameHint: Wrap your code with a label like SCAN ME so people know to scan it.
controls.frameTextHint: Shown on the frame. Leave empty for no caption.
controls.frameColorLowContrast: This frame color blends into the background. Pick a more contrasting color so the frame stays visible.

formatDescriptions.png: Raster image format, best for web and digital use

errors.emptyContent: Please enter content to generate QR code
